_notes: FALLBACK ONLY — the primary city registry is the Convex cities table, fetched at the start of every run via /cms-snapshot/cities.
This file is used only when that endpoint is unreachable (or not yet deployed), so a Convex outage can't stop the daily backstop run.
Add new cities in the CMS admin (events-management cities table, isActive: true) — they start syncing on the next run with no change here.
Keep this list roughly in step with the active Convex cities so the fallback stays useful.
